title: jasminum officinale f. aureovariegatum
intro: Jasminum officinale f. aureovariegatum, also known as the gold-variegated Jasmine, is a fragrant flowering plant that belongs to the family Oleaceae and is native to India and Sri Lanka. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Jasminum officinale f. aureovariegatum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
